titleStmt.title: SII 29.16: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 16. (A.R. No. B. 538 of 1961-62.) BALLAṬGI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On two pieces of a slab lying near the temple of Rāmalinga.

The record is broken and damaged. It registers a grant of land to the temple of Chāmēśvara for worship and offerings to the god, repairs and maintenance of the temple, construction of a sabhāmanṭapa, for the performances such as music, singing and dancing and three oil mills for burning perpetual lamps in the temple by probably the queen (name list) of Chālukya Trailōkyamalladēva. The grant was probably made over to a Kāḷāmukha saint. There is a mention of Mosaḷikal-300 a kaṁpaṇa of Eḍadoṟe-2000 and the place Māḷavūra. The record at the end tells us that the engraver-Vōja also has been given 5 mattar land. The measuring rod Piriyakōlu, and Bāguḷa-māna are mentioned here.

It is dated in the cyclic year Īśvara, Pushya, ba. 5 Monday. It corresponds to 1037 A.D., December 29. But the weekday was Thursday. The date corresponds to the reign period of Chālukya Jayasiṁha II who (name lost in this damaged record) is mentioned as Trailōkyamalladēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jana kāmadhēnu (trailō)kyamalladēva
(ma) viśāḷa vakṣasthaḷa nivarjjyanīya
(eḍa)doṟeyircchāsirada kaṁpaṇa mosaḷikalmūnūṟaṟa
ḷmāḍisida cāmēśvarakke māḷavūrada
(ī)śvara saṁvatsarada puṣya bahuḷa 5 sōmavāradaṁdu
nimittadiṁ Ānē(yā) dēvarggeru mukhamāge śrīmattraiḷō
Alliya piriya kōlōḷ bāguḷa(māna) baṭṭeyali kō
raṁ mūḍala dēgulada bhōgakke nṛtyagerravādyakkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭita
nakkaṁ sarbabādhā parihāramāge biṭṭa kariya nela mattar
daṁ mattarondu nandādīvigege ghāṇa mūṟu sabhāmaṁṭapadiṁ
panneraḍu Īsthānaṁ kāḷāmukha naiṣṭhika(paṭṭa)namī dharmma(mā)caṁdrārkka tāra(ṁ) pratipā
(māraṇa bara) prayāgeya taḍiyoḷā brāhmaṇa vadhegeyda dōṣaṁ sārgguṁ . ślōka . (sva)
dattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harētu vasundarāṁ ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharma sētu nṛpāṇāṁ kāḷe kāḷe pāḷaniyō bhavadbhi ssarvvānētānbhāvinaḥ
pārtthivēndrān bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ . sūtradhāri kasiga
mōjaṁge dhārā pūrbbakadiṁ biṭṭanela mattaraydu dēvargge gadde .
Digital edition of SII 29.16 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
